entity.summary: Centralized digital-asset trading platform offering spot and futures markets, copy trading, crypto purchases, earn products, mobile access, and authenticated trading APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes spot and futures trading, copy trading, crypto purchases, earn products, market pages, mobile access, login/signup, and OpenAPI documentation. The official About page states that HIBT is a digital-asset trading service platform registered in Canada in 2021; no exact launch date is asserted here.

evidence.title: HiBT official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes buy-crypto, markets, spot, futures, copy trading, financial products, mobile access, and active account entry points.

evidence.title: HiBT About Us
evidence.notes: First-party About page identifies HIBT as a digital-asset trading service platform registered in Canada in 2021 and states that it provides spot and derivatives trading services to users worldwide.

evidence.title: HiBT OpenAPI documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party OpenAPI documentation covers spot and perpetual-contract trading, market data, order-book depth, account balances, order management, authentication, and trading endpoints.
